mapper.select: /* CommonCodeMapper.xml selectUserInfoList */ SELECT TRN_ID FROM TADMIN_EAI_USR_BATCH WHERE SND_PROC_TYP IN ('N','E','R') AND SND_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- AND SND_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 days', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY TRN_ID ORDER BY TRN_ID
